title: Creamy Macaroni Casserole
description: A comforting, creamy macaroni casserole perfect for a weeknight dinner. This indulgent dish combines the classic flavors of American comfort food.
instructions: Cook the macaroni according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the cream cheese and stir until melted and smooth.
Add the cheddar cheese and stir until melted.
Stir in the milk until well combined.
Add the cooked macaroni to the cheese sauce and stir until well coated.
Transfer the macaroni mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is heated through.
